name: DAREDEVIL
description: A tragic accident transformed Matt Murdock, blinding him, but awakening his incredible Radar Sense. When darkness falls, Daredevil wields his billy clubs in place of a gavel, doling out justice and purging the world of evil!
lore: Matt Murdock has always fought for the innocent, both as a lawyer and as Daredevil, protector of Hell's Kitchen. With superhuman senses that compensate for his lack of vision, this Man Without Fear leaps into action without hesitation. After Daredevil conquered the demon known as "The Beast," he found himself with a true devil inside. One of The Beast's captives, Yinglong, offered to help Daredevil harness this demonic power. Following Yinglong to the Eighth City, Daredevil transformed the prison realm into a refugee sanctuary, earning himself a new name: "Dizang."

abilities.name: JUSTICE JAB
abilities.description: Swing Billy Clubs forward. Gain Fury on hit

abilities.name: RIGHTEOUS CROSS
abilities.description: Cross your Billy Clubs and surge forward. Gain Fury on hit

abilities.name: OBJECTION!
abilities.description: Whirl billy clubs in a tight guard to block frontal damage and reflect projectiles, becoming immune to all incoming harm during this stance and gain Fury

stats.Special Effect: Block frontal damage and reflect projectiles, becoming immune to all incoming harm during this stance. Gain 60 Fury when successfully blocking an attack.

abilities.name: DEVIL'S LATCH
abilities.description: Fire a grappling line that reels Daredevil and his target toward each other. On completion, gain Fury and temporarily enables Cross Interrogation

stats.Special Effect: Enable Righteous Cross within 5 seconds after using this ability. Gain 30 Fury

abilities.name: INFERNAL FURY
abilities.description: Expend Fury to unleash Devil's Chain or Devil's Throw. Devil's Chain converts damage into Bonus Health, while Devil's Throw Slows enemies on hit and temporarily enables Cross Interrogation

stats.Special Effect: Devil's Throw slows enemies on hit
stats.Bonus Health Falloff: Falloff begins at 5s and decreases by 30/s
stats.Spell Field Range: Box shaped spell field. Length: 8m; Width: 4m; Height: 4m
stats.High Damage Spell Field Range: 2m spherical radius spell field at the end
stats.Damage: 40. Cause 65 damage when the target caught in the high damage range
stats.Max Number of Ricochets: 4. Up to 2 ricochets if there are no targets

abilities.name: Sonic Pursuit
abilities.description: Locks onto a target, gaining increased Speed; and Damage Reduction when attacked. While in range, dash to the target, Blinding them and restore Fury

stats.Movement Boost: 2.1m/s. Falloff begins at 10m away from the target, decreasing to 0.9m/s at 40m from the target
stats.Special Effect: If Daredevil defeats the target, refresh the cooldown. Gain 60 Fury after the dash

abilities.name: RADAR SENSE
abilities.description: Detect enemy movements within a set radius

abilities.name: BLIND ASCENT
abilities.description: Run along walls and spring off them to reposition

abilities.name: LET THE DEVIL OUT
abilities.description: Embrace the Beast within. Enemies in Daredevil's line of sight take damage and suffer a ramping Blind effect. Continually gain Fury while active

stats.Damage: 50/s. Cause 85 damage per second when reaching the max damage
stats.Blind Effect: Visual range 35m, decreasing to 10m when the Blind effect reaches its maximum

received.name: BLIND VERDICT
received.description: Daredevil shares the location of his Sonic Pursuit target with The Punisher. At the same time, The Punisher can launch a devil-infused shock grenade to damage and blind enemies

base.description: Objection! is enhanced. Whirling billy clubs now damage all enemies in range while deflecting Projectiles from all directions. Successfully deflecting attacks recovers Fury.

stats.Special Effect: Deflects projectiles from all directions while becoming invincible

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Iron Fist, Daredevil passively recovers Health for the entire duration of the ability.

base.description: Swings Devil's Chain in a criss-cross pattern, dealing damage to enemies in front and inflicting a Slow.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Black Widow, the damage radius is expanded, and landing hits recovers Fury.
